resources.string: Red steel receives serial numbers beneath the hammer line
RED STEEL RECEIVES NEW SERIAL NUMBERS

The forge chronicle records a day when the smoke towers erased the horizon and molten steel crossed the floor in red canals. Hydraulic hammers spoke louder than names, stamping identical numbers into plates that would outlast the hands that fed them forward. Three menials fell to the heat and were replaced before the quota bell cooled. Flesh ended, the line continued, and production rose like a monument against the void.
FORGE CHRONICLE. SMOKE TOWERS COVERED THE SKY. HYDRAULIC HAMMERS STRUCK WITHOUT MERCY. WORKERS FAILED AND WERE REPLACED. THE LINE CONTINUED. PRODUCTION IS THE MONUMENT.
